rules.question: Is each visible worker wearing required head protection?
rules.compliant_condition: All visible workers who require head protection have visible hard hats or equivalent head protection.
rules.violation_condition: At least one visible worker who requires head protection lacks visible head protection.
known_ambiguities: very small or blurred worker head

rules.question: Does the worker at height have visible fall-protection equipment?
rules.compliant_condition: Workers exposed to fall risk have visible harness or equivalent fall-protection equipment.
rules.violation_condition: A worker exposed to fall risk lacks visible harness or equivalent fall-protection equipment.
known_ambiguities: fall height not inferable from a single image
harness hidden by clothing or pose
worker not clearly exposed to fall hazard
temporary platform or ladder context unclear

rules.question: Is the visible elevated edge protected by a guardrail or equivalent barrier?
rules.compliant_condition: A visible elevated edge or opening has guardrail, barrier, or equivalent protection.
rules.violation_condition: A visible elevated edge or opening lacks guardrail, barrier, or equivalent protection.

rules.question: Is a worker unsafely close to active heavy equipment?
rules.compliant_condition: Visible workers are outside the apparent danger zone of heavy equipment.
rules.violation_condition: At least one visible worker appears within an unsafe proximity zone around heavy equipment.
known_ambiguities: equipment activity cannot be inferred from still image
depth and distance are visually ambiguous
worker separated by barrier not visible
